Privacy Policy

Your privacy is forged with the same care as our handcrafted pieces. This policy explains how CartForge collects, uses, and protects your personal data.

Last updated: June 12, 2026

Privacy topics

  • 🔒 1. Introduction & Scope
  • 📋 2. What We Collect
  • ⚙️ 3. How We Use Data
  • 🤝 4. Sharing & Disclosure
  • 🍪 5. Cookies & Tracking
  • 🛡️ 6. Data Security
  • ⚖️ 7. Your Privacy Rights
  • 🧒 8. Children's Privacy
  • ⏳ 9. Data Retention
  • 🌍 10. International Transfers
  • ✍️ 11. Changes to Policy
  • 📬 12. Contact Us

1. Introduction & Scope

CartForge ("we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy applies to all users of the CartForge website, mobile applications, and any related services (collectively, the "Service"). By using CartForge, you consent to the data practices described in this policy.

Our Forge Promise: We never sell your personal data to third parties. Transparency and trust are at the core of our craft.

2. What Information We Collect

We collect information to provide better services to all our customers. The types of data we gather include:

CategoryExamplesLegal Basis
Identity & ContactName, email address, shipping address, phone numberContract fulfillment, Legitimate interest
Payment InfoEncrypted payment method details (processed by PCI-DSS compliant gateways)Contract fulfillment
Order HistoryProducts purchased, return records, artisan preferencesContract, Legal obligation
Technical DataIP address, browser type, device identifiers, referring URLsLegitimate interest (security & analytics)
CommunicationsEmail interactions, support messages, newsletter engagementConsent, Legitimate interest

We do not knowingly collect sensitive data (e.g., health information, political beliefs) unless you explicitly provide it within customer support messages.

3. How We Use Your Information

CartForge uses collected data for the following purposes:

  • Order Processing: To fulfill purchases, send order confirmations, and provide shipping updates.
  • Customer Support: To respond to inquiries, manage returns, and resolve disputes.
  • Service Improvement: To analyze trends, optimize website performance, and personalize your shopping experience.
  • Marketing (with consent): To send you artisan stories, exclusive offers, and new collection alerts. You can opt-out anytime.
  • Legal & Security: To detect fraud, enforce our Terms of Service, and comply with applicable laws.

4. Sharing & Disclosure

We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal data to third parties. However, we may share information with trusted service providers who assist in operating our business, subject to confidentiality agreements:

  • Shipping carriers (e.g., USPS, DHL) to deliver your orders.
  • Payment processors (Stripe, PayPal) for secure transactions.
  • Email & marketing platforms (Klaviyo) for communication, only if you have opted in.
  • Legal authorities when required by law or to protect our rights.

Any data shared is limited to the minimum necessary.

5. Cookies & Tracking Technologies

CartForge uses cookies, local storage, and similar technologies to enhance user experience. These help us remember cart items, analyze site traffic, and personalize content. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings, but disabling certain cookies may affect site functionality.

Types of cookies: Essential (required for checkout), Analytics (Google Analytics, privacy-friendly), Functional (preferences). We do not use invasive cross-site tracking.

6. Data Security

We implement industry-standard security measures including SSL encryption, firewalls, and restricted access to personal data. While no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, we continuously update our protocols to protect your information against unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction.

PCI Compliance: All payment card data is encrypted and processed via Level-1 PCI DSS certified partners.

7. Your Privacy Rights

Depending on your location (e.g., California, EU, UK), you may have the following rights regarding your personal data:

  • Access: Request a copy of the data we hold about you.
  • Rectification: Correct inaccurate or incomplete information.
  • Erasure: Request deletion of your data (subject to legal retention periods).
  • Restrict Processing: Limit how we use your data.
  • Data Portability: Receive a machine-readable copy of your data.
  • Opt-out of Marketing: Unsubscribe via the link in our emails or by contacting us.

To exercise any of these rights, please email privacy@cartforge.com. We will respond within 30 days.

8. Children's Privacy

CartForge does not knowingly collect personal information from anyone under the age of 16. If we become aware that a child has provided us with personal data, we will delete such information immediately. Parents or guardians who believe their child has submitted data should contact us.

9. Data Retention

We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy, unless a longer retention period is required by law. For example, order records are kept for 7 years for tax and warranty purposes. Marketing data is retained until you unsubscribe or request deletion.

10. International Data Transfers

CartForge is based in the United States. If you are accessing our Service from outside the US, your data may be transferred to, stored, and processed in the US. We ensure appropriate safeguards such as Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) for EU/UK data transfers to protect your information.

11. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this policy from time to time to reflect changes in legal requirements, our practices, or operational needs. The "Last updated" date at the top of this page indicates when revisions were made. We encourage you to review this page periodically. Significant changes will be notified via email or site banner.

12. Contact Us

For any privacy-related questions, data requests, or concerns, please reach out to our Data Protection Officer:

privacy@cartforge.com
CartForge Privacy Office, 114 Craft Avenue, Los Angeles, CA 90012, USA
+1 (555) 724-3674 (Mon-Fri, 9am–5pm PST)

For residents of the European Union, you also have the right to lodge a complaint with your local supervisory authority.

Handcrafted world — Your privacy matters as much as our craftsmanship. Read our Privacy Policy to understand how we protect your data.
